event.description: You stumble upon a goblin camp in a forest clearing. Crude wooden barricades surround a smoldering campfire. A pack of goblins snarls at you, brandishing rusty daggers and jagged spears. They charge!
event.successText: Your blade cuts through the goblin ranks! They scatter into the trees, leaving behind their meager treasures.
event.failText: A goblin's dagger finds a gap in your defenses. The wound is shallow but painful.
